findings.description: HTML rendering includes a large, upside-down image artifact of the entire page preceding the text content.
findings.evidence: The PDF displays a standard right-side-up letter. The HTML shows an inverted image of the full page at the top, followed by the extracted text rendering right-side up underneath it.

findings.description: Missing graphics and signature images in the extracted text section.
findings.evidence: The NC state seal, David Miller's signature, and the DEQ footer logo are visible in the PDF but absent from the right-side-up text portion of the HTML.

findings.description: HTML rendering includes a large, upside-down image artifact of the entire page preceding the text content.
findings.evidence: The PDF displays a standard right-side-up notice. The HTML shows an inverted image of the full page at the top, followed by the extracted text right-side up at the bottom.

findings.description: Missing signature images in the extracted text section.
findings.evidence: The handwritten signatures for Brian Wrenn and Brenda Harris are present in the PDF but completely missing from the HTML text content.
